features.featureTitle: Generate polished service card banner images for each service category using the uploaded service images (Mini Readings, Love & Relationship Readings, Career/Money/Life, Deep & Detailed Readings, Premium/Exclusive) and incorporate logo elements (blue crescent moon, crystals, sparkle stars, botanical leaves) as decorative overlays to beautify each card. Save them as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/ and display them in the Services section as the visual header/illustration for each service package card.

Retheme the entire website to match the logo's color palette: primary steel blue (#2b7ab5 / similar), cream/off-white background (#f5f0ea), soft peach/rose accent for sparkles, and deep navy for text. Update all CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css, Tailwind config tokens (mystic colors), gradient backgrounds in App.tsx, Hero, Header, Services, About, Footer, ProductCatalog, Reviews, and all other section components to reflect this blue-crystal-moon color scheme consistently throughout.

Update the ServicesGallery component (frontend/src/components/ServicesGallery.tsx) and serviceGalleryImages data (frontend/src/data/serviceGalleryImages.ts) to use the newly generated service category images from frontend/public/assets/generated/ instead of placeholder paths, mapping each image to its correct service category label.
